headline: Kalshi secures temporary halt to Arizona criminal case after CFTC intervention
summary: Investing.com -- Kalshi Inc. has obtained a critical reprieve in its legal battle with Arizona authorities after a federal judge granted a restraining order to suspend a 20-count criminal indictment against the prediction market provider.

content.title: Kalshi secures temporary halt to Arizona criminal case after CFTC intervention

headline: A Look At Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Valuation After Strong Recent Returns And Mixed User Fair Value Views
summary: What the recent performance says about Interactive Brokers Group Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) has drawn attention after its recent trading performance, with a 1-day return of around a 1% decline, contrasted with gains over the past week, month and past 3 months. For investors tracking medium-term trends, IBKR shows a 5.1% return over the past week, 4.1% over the past month and around 1.1% over the past 3 months, all based on the latest closing price of US$71.21. See our latest analysis...
